summary:
Claim: Activated partial thromboplastin time (aPTT) is the best test to assess intrinsic pathway integrity.  
Evidence: - aPTT directly measures function of intrinsic pathway factors (VIII, IX, XI, XII) and inhibitors like antithrombin III. - Bleeding time evaluates platelet and vascular function, not coagulation cascade components.  
Answer: B
